disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Watery diarrhoea for ~6 hours beginning a few hours after a restaurant meal the patient believes was cross-contaminated with gluten
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me more about the diarrhoea — when did it start and what set it off?
What were you doing or eating just before this began?
How long has the diarrhoea been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started a few hours after I ate out — I'm pretty sure the meal was cross-contaminated. It's been watery and constant for about 6 hours now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Abdominal pain is diffuse and periumbilical, crampy and colicky — NOT localised to the right lower quadrant, no migration
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain — can you point to one spot, or is it all over?
Has the pain settled into one area, like the lower right side?
Is the pain crampy and spread out, or sharp and in one place?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's all around my belly button, sort of everywhere in the middle. It's crampy and comes in waves — it's not in one spot and it hasn't moved to my right side or anything.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: It just hurts in my tummy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Presyncope / lightheadedness on standing (orthostatic symptoms) — has not actually fainted
trigger_question_examples: You mentioned feeling faint — does that happen when you stand up?
Have you actually passed out, or just felt like you might?
Tell me about the dizziness — when is it worst?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When I stand up I go really lightheaded and feel like I might pass out, so I sit straight back down. I haven't actually fainted though.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unable to maintain oral fluid intake because of severe nausea — progressive dehydration risk, patient lives alone
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to keep any fluids down?
How much have you managed to drink since this started?
Is the nausea stopping you from drinking?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I keep trying to sip water but the nausea is so bad I can't really keep anything down. I've hardly had any fluids.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known coeliac disease with multiple identical prior flares triggered by accidental gluten exposure, each settling in 1-2 days
trigger_question_examples: Have you had episodes exactly like this before?
Do you have any ongoing medical conditions?
Has this happened after eating gluten before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I've got coeliac disease and I've had this exact reaction a few times before when I've accidentally had gluten. It's always settled down after a day or two.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No blood in the stool and no black/tarry motions — no haematochezia or melaena
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any blood in the diarrhoea, or black tarry stools?
Is there any blood or dark colour when you go to the toilet?
Any red or black in the stool?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, there's no blood or anything black — it's just watery.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, no sick contacts, no recent travel — argues against an infective cause
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever or chills?
Has anyone around you been unwell with the same thing?
Have you travelled anywhere recently or eaten anything unusual apart from the restaurant?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever that I've noticed, no one around me is sick, and I haven't travelled anywhere.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reduced urine output since the morning — objective marker of dehydration the patient can report
trigger_question_examples: When did you last pass urine, and was it a normal amount?
Have you been weeing much today?
Is your urine darker or less than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask, I don't think I've passed much urine since this morning.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone with no one available to help or monitor for deterioration overnight
trigger_question_examples: Is there anyone at home with you or who can check on you?
Do you live alone?
Is there someone who can stay with you tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I live on my own. There's no one here with me at the moment.
